## Product Brief
1. Cylera is a pioneer in healthcare IoT, IoMT, and OT cybersecurity and intelligence.
2. Their MedCommand™ platform provides real-time visibility, risk analysis, and threat detection for connected medical devices, OT, and IoT.
3. It uses patented digital twin technology for agentless monitoring and combines security insights with operational analytics.
